articles.title: Anthropic (@AnthropicAI) / Posts
articles.content: We're an AI safety and research company that builds reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. Talk to our AI assistant @claudeai on claude.ai. New Anthropic research: A global workspace in language models. New Anthropic research: Agentic misalignment in Summer 2026. A year after our blackmail experiments, we found four more ways that today’s autonomous AI agents misbehave in simulations. We tested many AI models, including Claude, in the four scenarios. We're introducing Claude for Teachers: free access to premium Claude capabilities for verified K-12 educators in the US, with a library of teaching skills and a direct connection to evidence-based curricula, mapped to academic standards in all 50 states. We’re committing $10 million CAD and partnering with leading AI institutions in Canada to help fund new AI research. In previous research, we found that Claude expresses over 3,000 values, like honesty and warmth. In new work, we asked how the values Claude expresses vary between Claude models and across languages.

articles.content: AMD is dedicated to supporting organizations inspiring the next generation of innovators through hands-on coding,. #AdvancingAI 2026 brings together developers, customers, and partners to explore what's next in AI infrastructure and deployment. Join AMD Chair and CEO Dr. Lisa Su and leaders from across the AI ecosystem as they share the technologies, innovations and ideas shaping what's next in AI. In the next episode of Advanced Insights, Head of Claude Code at @AnthropicAI Boris Cherny (@bcherny) joins Mark Papermaster for a conversation on how AI is accelerating workflows and the. Join industry leaders, developers, and partners to explore the innovations shaping the next era of AI. AMD and OpenAI Advance AI Networking at Scale with MRC. Join AMD at #AdvancingAI 2026 to explore how open software is helping organizations move from AI pilots to production and build for what's next. At AMD, our people are at the heart of everything we do, and we are proud to invest in the next generation of innovators.

articles.title: 鸟哥 | 蓝鸟会🕊️
articles.content: ## Post. 2026年这10个GitHub项目,建议你现在就存好,晚了别怪我没提醒。 1️⃣ OpenHands 自主编程智能体,76,500个星。苹果谷歌亚马逊奈飞英伟达的工程师都在偷偷用,你还在手搓代码? 🔗 github.com/OpenHands/Open… 2️⃣ Hermes Agent Nous Research二月才发的,三个月狂揽191,000个星。会自我进化的私人AI,养着养着它比你还懂你。 🔗 github.com/NousResearch/h… 3️⃣ CrewAI 多智能体协作真能落地干活,60%的财富500强都在用。 🔗 github.com/crewAIInc/crew… 4️⃣ Aider 终端里的AI结对编程,自动提交干净diff,独立开发者效率直接翻5倍。 🔗 github.com/Aider-AI/aider 5️⃣ n8n 开源版Zapier,400多个集成,自托管永久跑,不用交一分钱订阅。 🔗 github.com/n8n-io/n8n 6️⃣ LangGraph 2026年想做生产级AI智能体,这套编排骨架绕不开。 🔗 github.com/langchain-ai/l… 7️⃣ Cloudflare Agentic Inbox 自托管邮箱,AI自动读信起草回复,从此告别邮件焦虑。 🔗 github.com/cloudflare/age… 8️⃣ Browser Use 98,000个星,智能体自己上网填表爬数据约会议,真正的数字打工人。 🔗 github.com/browser-use/br… 9️⃣ awesome-mcp-servers 智能体插件大全,GitHub、Slack、Linear、Stripe、Postgres、Notion全都能接。 🔗 github.com/punkpeye/aweso… 🔟 claude-task-master 基于Claude Code的多智能体编排,一句话指令,AI团队就在你睡觉时把功能开发完了。 🔗 github.com/eyaltoledano/c… 存好别弄丢。100%免费,100%开源,这年头不用就是亏。. 刚扒到个狠货：Seedance2-skill，专门伺候字节Seedance 2.0和即梦的。别以为又是那种烂大街的提示词合集，人家是真把硬功夫打包好了： 1️⃣ 电影级的镜头语言 2️⃣ 专业的分镜结构 3️⃣ 运镜设计 4️⃣ 素材引用 整套塞给AI就完事了。 以前想拍出电影感，你得啃半年书练半年功；现在呢？复制粘贴，搞定。. 3:00 AM · Jun 13, 202630.4KViews. Don't miss what's happening. People on X are the first to know.
